claimSummary: In the modeled scalar arithmetic, the oracle attestation scalar for a selected DLC outcome completes the corresponding prepared adaptor signature, and a non-corresponding modeled scalar does not complete that signature.
explicitExclusions: Bitcoin transaction serialization and sighash implementation correctness
Bitcoin Core mempool relay and fee policy
oracle truth, liveness, key custody, and source quality
wallet state retention and production backups
market liquidity, solvency, legal enforceability, and user-fund safety
